source_rationale: RGS5 is a pericyte/perivascular marker, and its high expression in DDX4 AB+ cells suggests a perivascular-like identity within this sorted population
ACTA2 (alpha smooth muscle actin) is a canonical marker of smooth muscle/perivascular cells enriched in this population
TAGLN (transgelin) is a smooth muscle marker gene indicating contractile cell identity
MYH11 is a smooth muscle myosin heavy chain, a definitive marker of smooth muscle/perivascular cells
MCAM (CD146) is a pericyte surface marker commonly used to identify perivascular cells
NOTCH3 is a key signaling receptor in pericytes and vascular smooth muscle cells
Phospholamban is expressed in smooth muscle cells and regulates calcium handling
CD9 is a tetraspanin expressed on oogonia and germ cell progenitors, relevant to DDX4-sorted populations
Decorin is a hallmark extracellular matrix proteoglycan of ovarian stromal/fibroblast cells
PDGFRA is a canonical marker of mesenchymal stromal/fibroblast cells in the ovary
Collagen type I alpha 1 is a major extracellular matrix gene characteristic of stromal fibroblasts
SERPINE2 is a serine protease inhibitor expressed in ovarian stromal cells
Midkine is a growth factor expressed in ovarian stroma involved in follicular development
Steroidogenic acute regulatory protein is critical for steroidogenesis in ovarian theca/stromal cells
ALDH1A1 is involved in retinoic acid synthesis and marks ovarian stromal progenitor cells
ARX is a transcription factor expressed in ovarian somatic/stromal cells
Von Willebrand factor is a canonical endothelial cell marker involved in hemostasis
Claudin-5 is a tight junction protein specific to endothelial cells
CD34 is a classic endothelial and hematopoietic progenitor surface marker
EGFL7 is an endothelial-specific secreted factor critical for vascular development
CLEC14A is a C-type lectin specifically expressed on endothelial cells
Aquaporin-1 is a water channel highly expressed in vascular endothelial cells
PALMD is enriched in endothelial cells and associated with vascular biology
Carbonic anhydrase 4 is expressed on the luminal surface of endothelial cells
NOSTRIN is an endothelial nitric oxide synthase trafficking inducer specific to endothelium
TM4SF1 is a transmembrane protein enriched in endothelial cells involved in angiogenesis
Anti-Müllerian hormone is a canonical granulosa cell marker produced by growing follicles
TNNI3 is highly expressed in ovarian granulosa cells and serves as a distinguishing marker
WFDC2 (HE4) is an epithelial secretory protein expressed in granulosa cells
Keratin 18 is an epithelial cytokeratin marking the epithelial nature of granulosa cells
Keratin 8 is a canonical epithelial marker expressed in granulosa cells
GSTA1 is a glutathione S-transferase enriched in granulosa cells for detoxification
GATM is involved in creatine biosynthesis and is a known granulosa cell marker
EMX2 is a transcription factor important for ovarian and granulosa cell development
Prostaglandin D2 synthase is highly expressed in granulosa cells of the ovary
Desmoplakin marks the epithelial junctional character of granulosa cells
WNT6 is a Wnt ligand involved in granulosa cell signaling and folliculogenesis
HOPX is a homeodomain transcription factor expressed in granulosa cells
HLA-DRA is an MHC class II molecule highly expressed on antigen-presenting immune cells
CD74 is the MHC class II invariant chain, a canonical marker of antigen-presenting immune cells
TYROBP (DAP12) is an adaptor protein essential for innate immune cell signaling
CCL5 (RANTES) is a chemokine produced by T cells and NK cells in immune responses
CD69 is an early activation marker on lymphocytes and other immune cells
NKG7 is expressed in cytotoxic lymphocytes including NK and T cells
AIF1 (IBA1) is a marker of myeloid/macrophage lineage immune cells
CD52 is a glycoprotein broadly expressed on lymphocytes and monocytes
Lysozyme is a canonical myeloid cell marker expressed in monocytes and macrophages
FCER1G is an Fc receptor gamma chain expressed on myeloid and NK immune cells
CD163 is a scavenger receptor and canonical marker of tissue-resident macrophages/monocytes
CD14 is a classic monocyte/macrophage surface marker and LPS co-receptor
C1QA is a complement component highly expressed in tissue macrophages
C1QB is a complement subunit characteristic of resident macrophages
C1QC completes the complement C1q complex and marks tissue macrophages
Lysozyme is a canonical myeloid marker highly expressed in monocytes and macrophages
Cystatin C is highly expressed in monocytes/macrophages
Cathepsin S is a cysteine protease involved in MHC class II processing in monocytes/macrophages
FOLR2 is a marker of tissue-resident macrophages, particularly in the ovary
LYVE1 marks a subset of tissue-resident perivascular macrophages
CSF1R (CD115) is the macrophage colony-stimulating factor receptor, a definitive monocyte/macrophage marker
FCGR2A (CD32) is an Fc gamma receptor expressed on monocytes and macrophages
MS4A7 is a membrane-spanning protein enriched in monocytes and macrophages
Stabilin-1 is a scavenger receptor on tissue-resident macrophages
Zona pellucida glycoprotein 3 is a canonical oocyte-specific marker essential for fertilization
FIGLA is an oocyte-specific transcription factor essential for folliculogenesis
NLRP5 is a maternal-effect gene specifically expressed in oocytes
DPPA3 (Stella) is a germ cell-specific gene essential for oocyte development
ZAR1 is an oocyte-specific RNA-binding protein critical for early embryogenesis
KPNA7 is an oocyte-specific importin alpha involved in nuclear transport during oogenesis
OOSP2 is an oocyte-secreted protein specific to female germ cells
GTSF1 is a gametocyte-specific factor involved in piRNA pathway and germ cell development
STAG3 is a meiosis-specific cohesin subunit essential for oocyte chromosome segregation
FOXR1 is a forkhead transcription factor expressed specifically in oocytes
UCHL1 (PGP9.5) is a deubiquitinating enzyme highly expressed in oocytes and germ cells
EPCAM marks oocytes and early germ cells in the human ovary
RGS5 is a canonical pericyte marker regulating G-protein signaling in perivascular cells
Alpha smooth muscle actin is a definitive marker of pericytes and vascular smooth muscle cells
Transgelin is a smooth muscle/pericyte marker involved in cytoskeletal organization
Smooth muscle myosin heavy chain 11 is a canonical vascular smooth muscle/pericyte marker
MCAM (CD146) is a well-established pericyte surface marker
NOTCH3 is essential for pericyte/vascular smooth muscle cell identity and signaling
Phospholamban is expressed in smooth muscle/perivascular cells regulating calcium signaling
Myosin light chain 9 is a smooth muscle contractile protein marking perivascular cells
NDUFA4L2 is a hypoxia-responsive gene enriched in pericytes
HIGD1B is a mitochondrial inner membrane protein enriched in pericytes
Decorin is a canonical stromal/fibroblast extracellular matrix proteoglycan
PDGFRA is a definitive marker of mesenchymal stromal/fibroblast cells
Collagen type I alpha 1 is a major structural gene of stromal fibroblasts
Collagen type I alpha 2 is a key extracellular matrix component of stromal cells
Osteoglycin is a small leucine-rich proteoglycan characteristic of ovarian stroma
Claudin-11 marks ovarian stromal cells and is involved in cell-cell adhesion
STAR is essential for steroidogenesis in ovarian theca-interstitial stromal cells
Complement C1s is produced by stromal fibroblasts as part of innate immunity
APOE is expressed by ovarian stromal cells involved in lipid metabolism
MMP2 is a matrix metalloproteinase secreted by stromal fibroblasts for ECM remodeling
CD3D is a component of the T cell receptor complex and definitive T cell marker
CD3E is a core T cell receptor signaling subunit and canonical T cell marker
CD3G is part of the TCR complex, confirming T cell identity
CCL5 (RANTES) is a chemokine highly produced by effector T cells
CD2 is a T cell and NK cell surface adhesion molecule
IL7R (CD127) is a key cytokine receptor marking T cell subsets
Granzyme K is expressed by effector memory T cells
Granzyme A is a serine protease in cytotoxic T lymphocytes
NKG7 is expressed in cytotoxic T cells and NK cells mediating granule exocytosis
PTPRC (CD45) is a pan-leukocyte marker essential for T cell receptor signaling
KLRB1 (CD161) is expressed on NK T cells and subsets of T cells
Interferon gamma is a hallmark cytokine of activated T cells
IL32 is a pro-inflammatory cytokine predominantly expressed by T cells and NK cells
